evals.prompt: Review the latest commit in the current repository using code-review
evals.expected_output: A code review report with issues found, confidence scores, and recommendations

evals.prompt: Run a code review on my uncommitted changes
evals.expected_output: A local mode review that saves results to docs/code-review/

evals.prompt: I want to review PR #123 for potential bugs and CLAUDE.md violations
evals.expected_output: A PR mode review that posts a comment via gh
